Item Details:

## sidebar-08

An inset sidebar with secondary navigation.

**Type:** registry:block
**Files:** 6 file(s)

visual_summary: A compact, inset sidebar with secondary navigation. It provides a secondary menu for navigation in applications. This component can be used to offer an additional layer of organization and accessibility to users.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sidebar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-08
Description: A compact, inset sidebar with secondary navigation. It provides a secondary menu for navigation in applications. This component can be used to offer an additional layer of organization and accessibility to users.
Style: inset, compact
Interactions: collapsible, expandable
Tags: sidebar, navigation, secondary

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
